parents.subject: LU-6016 tests: do not need start MDS in sanity-lfsck test 20a

commit.subject: LU-5773 test: reduce thread count
commit.message:
LU-5773 test: reduce thread count

Reduce thread count for the test_1c of obdfilter-survery test to
prevent OOM on vm.

Lustre-commit: 6e80a4023caceccc2691d006104c01fbbeb3c4a8
Lustre-change: http://review.whamcloud.com/13078/

Test-Parameters: alwaysuploadlogs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
mdtcount=1 testlist=obdfilter-survey,obdfilter-survey,obdfilter-survey

Signed-off-by: Niu Yawei <yawei.niu@intel.com>
Change-Id: I152a80f740026110e8e5723d25e88db517e47c1f
